paragraphs: Full-Stack Architect/Lead Developer with expertise spanning modern application development and enterprise data infrastructure. Core technical skills include React, Next.js, and Angular on the front-end, with robust back-end proficiency in Laravel (up to v10) and Python.

Comprehensive experience leveraging AWS for cloud architecture and significant expertise in the cutting-edge Data Lake ecosystem, utilizing tools like Apache Ranger, Minio, Hudi, and Trino. Proven ability to deliver robust, scalable, and data-driven solutions across the entire software lifecycle.

projectsIntro: Professional and personal work across e-commerce, government digital services, fintech, enterprise data platforms, and theater management systems.

projects.name: Visual Design Data Workflow Manager
projects.description: Visual data workflow platform for non-technical users to extract, merge, and transform data from different endpoints into one platform.

projects.name: PHD Deals
projects.description: E-commerce platform for trading games and hobby items.

projects.name: Tamm Abu Dhabi / Wipro
projects.description: Government digital services platform designed to centralize and deliver Abu Dhabi government services online.

projects.name: Cryptoworth
projects.description: Platform for crypto traders to sync transaction history from wallets and exchanges, then calculate cost basis, gains/losses, and tax values.

projects.name: Subclub
projects.description: Platform for shop owners to register stores and publish products, with customer subscriptions to packages on weekly or monthly plans.

projects.name: Ceylon Assets
projects.description: Platform enabling users to monitor asset values including index funds, money market funds, and dollar-bound funds.

projects.name: Kipstore
projects.description: Platform for users to analyze their business model.

projects.name: Dxone
projects.role: Xinfinit Pvt Ltd — Lead / Scrum Master
projects.description: Crypto trading platform allowing users to connect wallets and exchange coins through a KYC-verified registration process.

projects.name: Mountain Wolf
projects.description: Crypto trading platform enabling users to trade crypto coins through a unified exchange experience.

projects.name: Cedar Electronics
projects.description: Dashcam video streaming platform for a consumer electronics company. Dash cams sync GPS and Wi-Fi data to the cloud; users log in via web or mobile to select, edit, and download videos.

projects.name: MK2
projects.description: Theater management system for MK2, a France-based event management organization. Master users create movies/events, media, rooms, and theaters; daughter users schedule events and define pricing.

projects.name: Scope Cinemas
projects.description: Theater management system for a Sri Lankan cinema chain with 7 theatres in Colombo. Supports normal and advance bookings, with admin tools for movies, theatres, schedules, and pricing.

projects.name: 444-app
projects.description: Unified booking platform for movies, events, travel tickets, medical appointments, and more.

experience.title: Contract Employee
experience.description: Full-stack development on a crypto portfolio platform that syncs transaction history from wallets and exchanges and calculates cost basis, gains/losses, and tax values.

experience.title: Freelancer
experience.description: Projects include Visual Design Data Workflow Manager, PHD Deals, Tamm Abu Dhabi, Subclub, Kipstore, and Ceylon Assets.

experience.title: Lead / Scrum Master
experience.description: Led the team as scrum master, reviewed code before merging, discussed technical problems with team members, and validated requirements with business analysts. Projects include Dxone and Mountain Wolf.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineering Consultant
experience.description: Identified project scope and selected appropriate technologies. Delivered Cedar Electronics dashcam video streaming platform using React and Redux.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Led architecture and development on theater and booking platforms. Projects include MK2, Scope Cinemas, and 444-app.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
experience.description: Oversaw requirements gathering, planning, design, implementation, and testing. Projects include LearmnerSocial (Laravel 4, Angular, Node.js/Express, MongoDB).

experience.title: Developer
experience.description: Projects include Student Management System (Don Bosco Technical College), Account Ledger Management System (GOBA Association), and Product Line Management System (North Sail Manufacturers).
